referenceNotes: Use as a split-screen interview composition reference.
Two-person layout with separate left/right subject zones.
Large lower-third Japanese text overlays are part of the style.
Top title/header treatment can be reused as a branded information strip.
Logo placement is a persistent brand marker, usually near the upper left.
Additional text annotations should be tracked separately from main subtitles.
